concepts_used.title: 模型假设的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 论文列出了6条假设，包括CaCO3使用年限、建筑市场增长、经济周期等，为后续建模提供基础。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: ASSUMPTIONS : 1. CaCO₃ can be used for a year, and overused CaCO₃ will be given up. 2. All Construction waste(CaCO₃ ) can be used several time... 3. Construction market will constantly grow... 4. Economic depression will appear regularly. 5. Economic depression... can be displayed sine function. 6. Construction waste ∝ Emission of CO₂ .

concepts_used.title: 非线性与指数模型拟合
concepts_used.how_used: 用正弦函数模拟建筑垃圾释放量的年增长，并积分得到总建筑垃圾量，进而计算CO2去除量。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Setting α releasement of construction waste in 2007 and Y annual increasement of construction waste releasement, the annual total waste is α +∫{40sin(x/20)+40}dx. So after x years, we can remove 0.88n[α +∫{40sin(x/20)+40}dx] = 0.88n[-800cos(ix/20)+40x+α+C]

concepts_used.title: 线性规划建模
concepts_used.how_used: 建立线性规划模型，以反应天数和丢弃天数为变量，总成本为约束，求解最优反应天数n。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Let's assume : A year contains reacting day... and discard day... Then we can get one formula : x+y = 365... 500x+100y = 100000

concepts_used.title: 常用图表类型及选择指南
concepts_used.how_used: 使用折线图展示CO2排放趋势和预测，以及柱状图展示各州排放量，辅助分析。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Look at the <chart 1>... Look at the <chart 2>... In this graph, we can see the emission level of each states.

concepts_used.title: 中心化/归一化/标准化
concepts_used.how_used: 根据分子量比例（CaCO3:CO2=100:44）计算去除系数r=0.88，将建筑垃圾量转化为CO2去除量。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Because the molecular weight of CaCO₃ is 100 and that of CO₂ is 44, a single ton of CaCO₃ can remove 0.88n tons of CO₂ for a year. (1 : r = 100 : 88) r = 0.88

concepts_used.title: 灵敏度分析
concepts_used.how_used: 通过改变n值（每年反应次数）分析达到CO2去除目标所需时间的变化，并讨论n过小或过大的效率与成本问题。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: If we do twice a year, it takes 77 years to reach the equal point... if we do 'n' times a year, it will take 154/n year to reach the point. If n is too small, we can't expect any efficiency... But if n is too large, it costs too much...

concepts_used.title: 地理信息可视化
concepts_used.how_used: 根据各州CO2排放量分级（>20000吨需4个反应器，<2000吨需1或0个），提出反应器布局方案。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We concluded that the reactor has to be built many in the states that emit more CO2. Namely, the states that emit CO2 more than 20000 tons a year need four reactors... We made a standard : CO2 Emissions(ton) more than 20000 4, 10000 to 20000 3, 5000 to 10000 2, 2000 to 5000 1, less than 2000 1 or 0
